flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southern Methodist University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.2k → $67.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southern Methodist University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.2k → $67.0k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Southern Methodist University are 47% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($78.4k vs $53.4k).
